summary: Comprehensive testing of NeuCarS Cardiac Electrophysiology Analysis Platform - Iteration 5. All requested features verified working: Drug selection with individual perfusion settings, Multiple 'Other' drugs with µM concentration, Beat-by-beat pulse adjustment with cascade to future pulses, HRV metric info popovers, Baseline vs per-minute explanation popover, Light pulse highlights on trace viewer.
passed_tests: ✅ Frontend header shows 'NeuCarS' after file upload
✅ Drug selection with 5 predefined drugs (Propranolol, Nepicastat, Tetrodotoxin, Acetylcholine, Isoproterenol)
✅ Each drug has individual perfusion start and time settings
✅ Drug concentration displayed in µM units
✅ Default perfusion start=3min and time=3min per drug
✅ Multiple 'Other' drugs can be added with name and concentration in µM
✅ Light panel shows 'Beat: [-] [+]' buttons for beat-by-beat adjustment
✅ Light panel shows '±5s: [<] [>]' buttons for seconds adjustment
✅ Note displayed: 'Moving this pulse will automatically shift all following pulses to maintain intervals'
✅ HRV metrics in per-minute table have info popovers (SDNN, RMSSD, pNN50)
✅ SDNN popover shows: 'Standard deviation of NN intervals. Computed over a 3-minute sliding window, normalized to 70 bpm.'
✅ HRV Analysis section has help icon for baseline vs per-minute explanation
✅ Per-Minute Metrics section has help icon explaining table columns
✅ TraceViewer.js implements light pulse highlights with 'Stim N' labels (ReferenceArea components)
seed_data_creation: Used pyABF sample file (model_vc_step.abf) from GitHub for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features verified working: Drug configuration now has independent perfusion start/time per drug (default 3/3 min), Multiple 'Other' drugs with µM concentration, Beat-by-beat pulse adjustment with cascade to future pulses, Popover tooltips for HRV metrics (SDNN, RMSSD, pNN50) in per-minute table, Popover explaining baseline vs per-minute difference, Light pulse highlights on trace with 'Stim N' labels (code verified in TraceViewer.js).

features_verified.drug_configuration: Working - 5 predefined drugs + 'Other' option with individual settings per drug
features_verified.drug_concentration_unit: Working - µM displayed for all drugs
features_verified.multiple_other_drugs: Working - Can add multiple 'Other' drugs with custom names and concentrations
features_verified.beat_adjustment: Working - 'Beat: [-] [+]' buttons for beat-by-beat pulse adjustment
features_verified.cascade_note: Working - Note about cascading shifts to future pulses displayed
features_verified.hrv_info_popovers: Working - SDNN, RMSSD, pNN50 columns have info buttons showing metric explanations
features_verified.baseline_explanation_popover: Working - Help icon next to HRV Analysis and Per-Minute Metrics titles
features_verified.light_pulse_highlights: Verified in code - TraceViewer.js has ReferenceArea components with 'Stim N' labels
